user_message: Just came out of competitive positioning with Coho Winery. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-11 09:51 EST
Subject: Re: competitive positioning Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about competitive positioning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
Date: 2024-02-11 09:17 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Coho Winery competitive positioning

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with competitive positioning. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-20 10:48 EST
Subject: URGENT: competitive positioning Issue at Coho Winery

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with competitive positioning. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Coho Winery: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence
